Elombe Kisala — Designer & Developer

Who I am
I design and build custom website solutions: Webflow design and development, Shopify + Webflow storefronts, and automation (Make, Zapier, AI workflows) for lead capture, CRM, and follow-up. I help businesses increase conversion and performance.

Services
- Webflow: custom design and development, responsive sites, CMS, SEO basics.
- Shopify + Webflow: custom storefront design with Shopify handling products and checkout.
- Automation: lead capture → CRM → email/Slack; reporting and dashboards.

How to hire me
1. Visit https://elombekisala.com/start/ and submit your project brief (what you need, budget range, timeline).
2. Or email elombekisala@gmail.com with the same details.
3. I respond within 24 hours. We then align on scope and next steps.
